---
title: "Thermal Power Plant Closed-loop Efficiency Optimization"
domain: "power"
period: "2024-Present"
role: "Project Lead"
problem: "Improve equivalent heat rate under volatile coal quality and load swings while enforcing strict NOx and hardware safety limits."
method: "Robust optimization with hard constraints, condition-adaptive feasible-set tightening, surrogate-assisted online optimization, and rollback-ready release pipeline."
outcome: "Fuel-specific consumption reduced (~1.5% in one deployment line and ~1-3 g/kWh across multi-unit settings), fewer violations, and sustained long-run operation."
status: "deployed"
confidentiality: "public-safe"
selected: true
toc: false
---

## Context

This project targets coal-fired unit operation in fast-changing conditions (load transitions, coal blend shifts, and equipment limits), where manual tuning often trades efficiency for conservative operation.

## Method

- Built robust constrained optimization models for setpoint decisions.
- Added condition-adaptive feasible-set tightening and two-layer protections.
- Used local surrogate models to reduce cross-site distribution shift.
- Adopted decoupled train/inference/optimization/release pipelines with rollback and replay checks.

## Outcome

- Improved efficiency and reduced fuel consumption under safety/environment constraints.
- Reduced strategy switch latency and operator workload.
- Enabled cross-site template reuse for faster deployment.

## Role

I led technical roadmap design, safety strategy, acceptance criteria definition, and cross-team coordination.
